protocols.Paper_title: Streamlining viral safety in AAV manufacturing: Simultaneous cell lysis and viral inactivation using biodegradable detergents
protocols.Evidence: “HEK293 cells were lysed using detergent compositions A and B… The experiment was conducted at 25 ± 1°C… for simultaneous cell lysis and VI.”

protocols.Paper_title: Streamlining viral safety in AAV manufacturing: Simultaneous cell lysis and viral inactivation using biodegradable detergents
protocols.Evidence: “the required lysis solution… were added… After 24 h… the contents were centrifuged… collected for ddPCR analysis… A 1% Triton X-100 solution was included as a positive control.”
